intro: Financial services and government organisations were the primary targets in a wave of 49 phishing attacks recorded between 8 and 26 April 2026. The campaign involved threat actors FakeWallet, Lazarus Group, and LockBit, and exploited vulnerabilities including CVE-2023-22515, CVE-2023-34048, CVE-2023-46805, CVE-2023-4966, and CVE-2024-21893. The attacks affected sectors such as hospitality, cryptocurrency, and technology, with a global reach that also included Latin America, Canada, the Caribbean, and the United States. Of the incidents, 41 were rated high severity and 8 medium.
